response.justification: Bogdan is a highly seasoned Staff-level software engineer with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and building robust, scalable systems. However, he falls significantly short of the requirement for 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions, as his AI exposure appears limited to his most recent role starting in 2025. Furthermore, his resume lacks any mention of Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures, which are critical core competencies for this position.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience at the Staff level across diverse tech stacks and architectures.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js, which are listed as key technologies for the role.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Severely lacks the required minimum of 8 years specifically building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
No explicit experience with Python, vector databases, or RAG architectures mentioned on the resume.
Limited evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery sessions or enterprise consulting.
